companyDescription:
We have the world’s best talent that design, run, and manage the most advanced and reliable technology infrastructure each day. Together, we think holistically about the health of these vital technology ecosystems.

We are a focused, independent company that builds on our foundation of excellence by creating systems in new ways. Bringing in the right partners, investing in our business, and working side-by-side with our customers to unlock potential. We're raising the bar.

Our experience speaks for itself: We have tens of thousands of highly skilled employees around the world serving most of the Fortune 100 companies. But our purpose is what drives us: Advancing the vital systems that power human progress. Because when a digital ecosystem is healthy, it can more readily adapt and support continuous growth and that opens up a world of possibility for everyone.

Together, we are the heart of progress.
companySlogan: We design, build, manage and modernize the mission-critical technology systems that the world depends on every day.
descriptionHtml:
Who We Are

At Kyndryl, we design, build, manage and modernize the mission-critical technology systems that the world depends on every day. So why work at Kyndryl? We are always moving forward – always pushing ourselves to go further in our efforts to build a more equitable, inclusive world for our employees, our customers and our communities.

The Role

Presales Business Architect – S/4HANA, where your expertise will shape the future of enterprise transformation. As a certified SAP leader, you will be instrumental in driving SAP RISE and S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE) transformations, delivering innovative, cloud-first solutions that redefine how our customers operate and grow.

In this role, you won’t just support presales—you’ll architect the future. You’ll be a trusted advisor and strategic partner, collaborating with Kyndryl Consult Partners and client stakeholders to design and deliver compelling SAP roadmaps and architectures. Your work will directly influence high-impact decisions, ensuring our clients’ journeys to the cloud are seamless, scalable, and successful.

What You’ll Do:

  • Lead SAP RISE & S/4HANA Transformations: Provide expert presales support and technical leadership to ignite transformation initiatives, leveraging the SAP Activate Methodology.
  • Architect the Future: Design comprehensive application integration architectures and technical roadmaps that guide clients from legacy systems to modern, cloud-based landscapes.
  • Collaborate with Purpose: Work closely with client stakeholders to gather business requirements, define solution architectures, and align transformation strategies with business goals.
  • Drive Technical Excellence: Define SAP licensing, landscape sizing, and infrastructure requirements for S/4HANA PCE on hyperscalers.
  • Unify Cross-Functional Expertise: Aggregate and lead cross-functional teams to design integrated application solutions and define robust integration strategies.
  • Champion SAP Standards: Specify SAP RISE service catalog components and Bill of Materials, ensuring technical compliance and readiness for onboarding.
  • Build Strategic Relationships: Cultivate trusted advisor relationships with SAP application architects and CTOs within client organizations.
  • Ensure Delivery Readiness: Coordinate and validate SAP landscape installations with Basis teams, ensuring smooth transitions from presales to delivery.

Your Future at Kyndryl

Every position at Kyndryl offers a way forward to grow your career. We have opportunities that you won’t find anywhere else, including hands-on experience, learning opportunities, and the chance to certify in all four major platforms. Whether you want to broaden your knowledge base or narrow your scope and specialize in a specific sector, you can find your opportunity here

Who You Are

You’re good at what you do and possess the required experience to prove it. However, equally as important – you have a growth mindset; keen to drive your own personal and professional development. You are customer-focused – someone who prioritizes customer success in their work. And finally, you’re open and borderless – naturally inclusive in how you work with others.

Required Technical and Professional Expertise:

  • Fluent in French
  • Minimum 9 years of consulting experience with a focus on SAP S/4HANA implementations and upgrades in domains such as Finance, Logistics, or Manufacturing.
  • Proven track record in technical application integration, interface definition, and upgrade/conversion strategies and tools.
  • Knowledge of selective data migration concepts and tooling accelerators for S/4HANA.
  • Expertise in ABAP development and managing ABAP development teams.
  • Strong presentation and communication skills in English and French, with negotiation capabilities.
  • Experience working in global, distributed teams with nearshore and offshore delivery models.
  • Willingness and ability to travel.
  • Ability to build and configure demo and proof-of-concept systems and integrations.

Preferred Technical and Professional Expertise:

  • Experience with SAP business process transformation tools (e.g., SAP Signavio, Celonis).
  • Familiarity with SAP infrastructure on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
  • Understanding of SAP RISE – S/4HANA PCE standard delivery services (e.g., TMS).
  • Knowledge of S/4HANA “clean core” principles and SAP automation/DevOps practices.
  • Experience with SAP Analytics Cloud integration and development.
  • Understanding of SAP BW to SAP Datasphere transformation strategies.
  • Experience with SAP PI/PO to Integration Suite migrations or implementations.
  • Exposure to SAP BTP low-code/no-code development and SAP Build extensions.

Kyndryl Benefits

  • Parental Bonding Program: Enjoy 28 days of paid leave to spend with your newborn.
  • Comprehensive Medical Care: Access above-standard medical services.
  • Employee Assistance Program: 24/7 helpline for support whenever you need it.
  • Flexible Working Pattern: Hybrid model to suit your lifestyle.
  • Modern Workspace: Work in a pleasant, open-space environment.
  • Learning Opportunities: Access a vast platform of self-education programs, certifications, and free language classes.
  • Career Growth: Explore career growth opportunities within the company after two years.
  • Various Discounts: Avail discounts on sports, culture, healthcare, childcare, electronics, and wellness.
  • Pension Fund and Life Insurance: Contributions to your pension fund and life insurance.
  • Referral Bonus Program: Attractive bonuses for successful referrals.
  • Generous Vacation: 5 weeks of paid vacation.
  • Global Travel and Group Life Insurance: Coverage for global travel and group life insurance.

Being You

Diversity is a whole lot more than what we look like or where we come from, it’s how we think and who we are. We welcome people of all cultures, backgrounds, and experiences. But we’re not doing it single-handily: Our Kyndryl Inclusion Networks are only one of many ways we create a workplace where all Kyndryls can find and provide support and advice. This dedication to welcoming everyone into our company means that Kyndryl gives you – and everyone next to you – the ability to bring your whole self to work, individually and collectively, and support the activation of our equitable culture. That’s the Kyndryl Way.

What You Can Expect

With state-of-the-art resources and Fortune 100 clients, every day is an opportunity to innovate, build new capabilities, new relationships, new processes, and new value. Kyndryl cares about your well-being and prides itself on offering benefits that give you choice, reflect the diversity of our employees and support you and your family through the moments that matter – wherever you are in your life journey. Our employee learning programs give you access to the best learning in the industry to receive certifications, including Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Skillsoft, and many more. Through our company-wide volunteering and giving platform, you can donate, start fundraisers, volunteer, and search over 2 million non-profit organizations. At Kyndryl, we invest heavily in you, we want you to succeed so that together, we will all succeed.

Get Referred!

If you know someone that works at Kyndryl, when asked ‘How Did You Hear About Us’ during the application process, select ‘Employee Referral’ and enter your contact's Kyndryl email address.

companySlogan: Votre partenaire recrutement aéronautique
descriptionHtml:
Safran est un groupe international de haute technologie opérant dans les domaines de l'aéronautique (propulsion, équipements et intérieurs), de l'espace et de la défense. Sa mission : contribuer durablement à un monde plus sûr, où le transport aérien devient toujours plus respectueux de l'environnement, plus confortable et plus accessible. Implanté sur tous les continents, le Groupe emploie 100 000 collaborateurs pour un chiffre d'affaires de 27,3 milliards d'euros en 2024, et occupe, seul ou en partenariat, des positions de premier plan mondial ou européen sur ses marchés. Safran est la 2ème entreprise du secteur aéronautique et défense du classement « World's Best Companies 2024 » du magazine TIME. Safran Aircraft Engines conçoit, produit et commercialise, seul ou en coopération, des moteurs aéronautiques civils et militaires aux meilleurs niveaux de performance, fiabilité et respect de l'environnement. La société est notamment, à travers CFM International*, le leader mondial de la propulsion d'avions commerciaux courts et moyen-courriers. * CFM International est une société commune 50/50 de Safran Aircraft Engines et GE Aerospace. Parce que nous sommes persuadés que chaque talent compte, nous valorisons et encourageons les candidatures de personnes en situation de handicap pour nos opportunités d'emploi.

Descriptif mission

Au sein du Département Méthodes et Ateliers numériques de la Direction Industrielle de Safran Aircraft Engines, vous contribuerez à la Transformation Digitale de la Direction et plus particulièrement au développement de la filière numérique du processus de fabrication MGF-04-MP0-Industrialiser Depuis quelques années la direction industrielle s'est engagée dans le projet d'outiller ses processus d'industrialisation et de fabrication en mettant en place un PLM pour instruire la conception des gammes et leur validation industrielle - ainsi qu'un MES (Manufacturing Executive System) - pour piloter la fabrication des pièces au sein de l'atelier. La quantité des flux d'informations entre les différents processus et les différents moyens mis en uvre pour les implémenter rendent la maîtrise des évolutions de ces systèmes complexes. Les enjeux de la transformation numérique imposent à Safran Aircraft Engines : D'appréhender au plus tôt la complexité et les impacts des modifications envisagées sur les processus ou sur les systèmes. De déployer des solutions homogènes sur l'ensemble des process tout en tenant compte des rapports gain/effort Ce travail est assuré par des architectes fonctionnels métiers. Aujourd'hui limité à 2 personnes, la direction industrielle souhaite élargir le champ d'actions de ces experts. Le poste d'architecte fonctionnel s'inscrit donc dans cette volonté de disposer d'une ressource supplémentaire capable de mener des études d'architectures en particulier sur le domaine de la production. Les activités du poste proposé sont axées principalement autour de la définition de l'architecture fonctionnelle des processus d'industrialisation et de production. En relation étroite avec les architectes DI et leurs homologues des autres directions, la mission consiste à décrire les processus en terme d'architecture, à dégager de ces travaux une vision et à cadrer les études nécessaires au déploiement des solutions retenues. Il s'agira de : Mener des études préalables sur les solutions technico-fonctionnelles en réponse à un besoin métier : o Définir les enjeux, les coûts et les gains (ROI) du sujet d'étude o Décrire les processus as-is et les besoins métiers o Modéliser les processus to-be en réponse aux besoins o Modéliser les architectures fonctionnelles de ces processus/ Cartographier les fonctions et le détail des flux de données o Identifier les données métiers concernées et proposer une définition pour les nouvelles en collaboration avec les data stewards. o Imaginer/Définir les solutions qui peuvent répondre aux besoins o Analyser les impacts et les risques relatifs à la couverture du besoin o Définir les roapmaps et la planification du ou des projets de réalisation o Contribuer au premier travaux de conception générale

Votre maîtrise des compétences de modélisation de systèmes et vos acquis techniques vous permettrons d'appréhender rapidement les principes d'architectures fonctionnelles attendus par Safran aircraft Engine. En tant qu'acteur principal de la transformation numérique, votre leadership est un atout indéniable pour promouvoir votre vision et coordonner sa mise en uvre. Enfin, votre attitude relationnelle et votre ouverture d'esprit vous permettront de vous intégrer facilement au sein d'une équipe de 10 personnes. La maîtrise ou l'usage préalable des solutions 3DEXPERIENCE/APRISO serait un avantage significatif pour le poste tout comme une expérience dans l'industrie aéronautique. Vous êtes intéressé(e) par l'innovation et la digitalisation des métiers de la Direction Industrielle et de ses directions partenaires.

companySlogan: GLOBAL AVIATION RECRUITMENT CONSULTING
descriptionHtml:
Line Up Aviation is a specialist aviation and aerospace recruitment company that has been operating worldwide for more than 35 years. We work with some of the industry's best-known companies who demand the highest standard of service.

We are currently recruiting for the following position on behalf of our global aviation client - a leading MRO provider specialising in the maintenance and overhaul of some of the world's premier business jets.

Job Title: Aircraft Engineers
 License: EASA B1.1 License required
 Location: Paris
Contract Type: Permanent, fulltime.
 Days of work: Monday to Friday only, no public holiday working.

Career Path:
 This is an excellent opportunity to launch your maintenance career with Europe's leading VIP Jet Centre, where you'll gain valuable experience and work towards obtaining aircraft type ratings.
To be considered, you must hold a full EASA B1.1 Aircraft Maintenance Licence (AML), untyped licences are acceptable - and have a minimum of 12-18 months' experience within a Part 145 maintenance environment.
You can expect to begin a type rating course within your first 12 months of employment.
To be accepted you will need to hold the right to live and work in France at time of application.

Main Duties:

Mechanical Engineers and Technicians perform scheduled and unscheduled repairs and maintenance on customer aircraft. Tasks are carried out under the supervision of the Senior Technician or Team Leader.

  • Support certifying staff to optimise project productivity.
  • Performs complex tasks under supervision.
  • Tests systems for troubleshooting and compliance with documentation.
  • Operates complex equipment proficiently.
  • Accurately records all completed work, including corrective actions and part details.
  • Ensures proper tool usage, compliance, and maintenance.
  • Contributes to the SMS approach by reporting risks and participating in investigations.
  • Logs maintenance tasks in SAP and collaborates effectively with the team.


Principal skills and attributes Required:

  • An EASA B1.1 AML
  • Knowledge of technical English required
  • Ability to read and interpret technical documentation to perform maintenance tasks in accordance with best practices
  • Knowledge of Part 145/SMS/FH/EWIS/CDCCL
  • Basic computer skills
  • Ability to work in a team
  • Ability to work in shifts
  • Driver's license B required
  • Precision, rigor, and flexibility
